    F

    finalize() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    This method is called by garbage collection.
    findAvailableTable(int) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
    Finds a currently available table in the restaurant that best fits the guest count.
    findAvailableTable(int, LocalDate, LocalTime) - Method in class logicControllers.TableController
    Finds the "Best Fit" table for a group of a specific size at a specific time. * Logic: 1.
    findExistingEntry(Integer, LocalDate, LocalTime) - Method in class DAO.WaitingListDAO
    Checks if a specific registered user already has an active spot in the waiting list.
    findExistingEntryByContact(String, String, LocalDate, LocalTime) - Method in class DAO.WaitingListDAO
    Searches for an active waiting list entry using contact details (Email or Phone).
    findFreeTable(int) - Method in class logicControllers.ReservationController
    Finds a currently free table that fits the group size.
    FORGOT_CODE - Enum constant in enum class enums.ActionType
     
    forgotCode(int) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Requests a forgot code operation for a user
    ForgotCodeCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for handling "forgot reservation code" requests.
    ForgotCodeCommand() - Constructor for class commands.ForgotCodeCommand
     
    ForgotCodeGuestHandler - Class in handlers
    Handler for processing the server response when a guest requests their forgotten confirmation code.
    ForgotCodeGuestHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.ForgotCodeGuestHandler
     
    ForgotCodeHandler - Class in handlers
    ResponseHandler implementation for handling the server response when a user requests their forgotten reservation confirmation code.
    ForgotCodeHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.ForgotCodeHandler
     
    ForgotCodeRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message sent when a user has forgotten their access code.
    ForgotCodeRequest(Integer) - Constructor for class messages.ForgotCodeRequest
    Constructs a new ForgotCodeRequest with the specified user ID.
    forWaitingList - Variable in class messages.GetAvailableTimesRequest
    Indicates whether the availability check is for the waiting list.
    Friday - Enum constant in enum class enums.RestaurantSettingsDays
     
    FRIDAY - Enum constant in enum class enums.Day
